Class AnthropicRateLimit

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.anthropic.metadata.AnthropicRateLimit
All Implemented Interfaces:
RateLimit
public class AnthropicRateLimit extends Object implements RateLimit
RateLimit implementation for the Anthropic SDK.

Parses Anthropic rate-limit response headers as documented at Anthropic rate limits. Beyond the request and token families exposed through the RateLimit contract, this class also surfaces the Anthropic-specific input-token and output-token buckets via dedicated getters.

Since:
2.0.0-M8
Author:
Gorre Surya, Soby Chacko
See Also:
  • RateLimit
  • Anthropic rate limits

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RateLimit
    from(com.anthropic.core.http.Headers headers)
    Parses Anthropic rate-limit headers from the given Headers.
    @Nullable Long
    getInputTokensLimit()
    Returns the maximum number of input tokens allowed within the rate-limit window.
    @Nullable Long
    getInputTokensRemaining()
    Returns the number of input tokens remaining within the current rate-limit window.
    @Nullable Duration
    getInputTokensReset()
    Returns the duration until the input-token rate-limit window resets.
    @Nullable Long
    getOutputTokensLimit()
    Returns the maximum number of output tokens allowed within the rate-limit window.
    @Nullable Long
    getOutputTokensRemaining()
    Returns the number of output tokens remaining within the current rate-limit window.
    @Nullable Duration
    getOutputTokensReset()
    Returns the duration until the output-token rate-limit window resets.
    Long
    getRequestsLimit()
    Returns the maximum number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
    Long
    getRequestsRemaining()
    Returns the remaining number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
    Duration
    getRequestsReset()
    Returns the time until the rate limit (based on requests) resets to its initial state.
    Long
    getTokensLimit()
    Returns the maximum number of tokens that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
    Long
    getTokensRemaining()
    Returns the remaining number of tokens that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
    Duration
    getTokensReset()
    Returns the time until the rate limit (based on tokens) resets to its initial state.
    String
    toString()

      public AnthropicRateLimit(@Nullable Long requestsLimit, @Nullable Long requestsRemaining, @Nullable Duration requestsReset, @Nullable Long tokensLimit, @Nullable Long tokensRemaining, @Nullable Duration tokensReset, @Nullable Long inputTokensLimit, @Nullable Long inputTokensRemaining, @Nullable Duration inputTokensReset, @Nullable Long outputTokensLimit, @Nullable Long outputTokensRemaining, @Nullable Duration outputTokensReset)

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static RateLimit from(com.anthropic.core.http.Headers headers)
      Parses Anthropic rate-limit headers from the given Headers.
      Parameters:
      headers - the HTTP response headers
      Returns:
      an AnthropicRateLimit populated from the headers, or an EmptyRateLimit if no rate-limit headers are present

    • getRequestsLimit

      public Long getRequestsLimit()
      Description copied from interface: RateLimit
      Returns the maximum number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsLimit in interface RateLimit
      Returns:
      an Long with the maximum number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
      See Also:
      • RateLimit.getRequestsRemaining()

    • getRequestsRemaining

      public Long getRequestsRemaining()
      Description copied from interface: RateLimit
      Returns the remaining number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsRemaining in interface RateLimit
      Returns:
      an Long with the remaining number of requests that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.
      See Also:
      • RateLimit.getRequestsLimit()

    • getRequestsReset

      public Duration getRequestsReset()
      Description copied from interface: RateLimit
      Returns the time until the rate limit (based on requests) resets to its initial state.
      Specified by:
      getRequestsReset in interface RateLimit
      Returns:
      a Duration representing the time until the rate limit (based on requests) resets to its initial state.
      See Also:
      • RateLimit.getRequestsLimit()

      Description copied from interface: RateLimit
      Returns the maximum number of tokens that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.

      Returns:
      an Long with the maximum number of tokens that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.

      Description copied from interface: RateLimit
      Returns the remaining number of tokens that are permitted before exhausting the rate limit.

      Returns:

      Returns the time until the rate limit (based on tokens) resets to its initial state.

      Returns:
      a Duration with the time until the rate limit (based on tokens) resets to its initial state.

    • getInputTokensLimit

      public @Nullable Long getInputTokensLimit()
      Returns the maximum number of input tokens allowed within the rate-limit window.
      Returns:
      the input tokens limit, or null if Anthropic did not return the header

    • getInputTokensRemaining

      public @Nullable Long getInputTokensRemaining()
      Returns the number of input tokens remaining within the current rate-limit window.
      Returns:
      the remaining input tokens, or null if Anthropic did not return the header

    • getInputTokensReset

      public @Nullable Duration getInputTokensReset()
      Returns the duration until the input-token rate-limit window resets.
      Returns:
      the duration until reset, or null if Anthropic did not return the header

    • getOutputTokensLimit

      public @Nullable Long getOutputTokensLimit()
      Returns the maximum number of output tokens allowed within the rate-limit window.
      Returns:
      the output tokens limit, or null if Anthropic did not return the header

    • getOutputTokensRemaining

      public @Nullable Long getOutputTokensRemaining()
      Returns the number of output tokens remaining within the current rate-limit window.
      Returns:
      the remaining output tokens, or null if Anthropic did not return the header

    • getOutputTokensReset

      public @Nullable Duration getOutputTokensReset()
      Returns the duration until the output-token rate-limit window resets.
      Returns:
      the duration until reset, or null if Anthropic did not return the header
